mapper.select:
select OBJECTID, OBJECTNAME,OBJECTMEMO, OBJECTSTATE, TABLEID,TABLENAME,RECENTDAYS OBJECTFLAG,DATATYPE,STORETYPE,DBSOURCE,SORTINDEX,PARENTID,TABLENAMEALIAS,DATA_SOURCE, EXHIVETABLENAME,HIVETABLENAME,ELLEMENTNAME,DELETER,ISPRIVATE,SECRETLEVEL,SJZYBQ1,SJZYBQ2,SJZYBQ3,SJZYBQ4,SJZYBQ5,SJZYBQ6, RELATE_TABLENAME,SOURCEID,ISACTIVETABLE,HD_DBSOURCE,TABLENAME_B,ISQUERY,GA_SOURCEID,to_char(CREATETIME ,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as createTime,SJZZYJFLVALLUE as SJZZYJFLVALLUE,SJZZEJFLVALUE as SJZZEJFLVALUE,SJZYLYLXVALUE as SJZYLYLXVALUE,STANDARD_TYPE as standardType, to_char(UPDATETIME ,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as updateTimeStr, CREATOR as creator, UPDATER as updater,version,versions from synlte.OBJECT
upper(tableId) = upper(#{tableId})

select OBJECTID, OBJECTNAME,OBJECTMEMO, OBJECTSTATE, TABLEID,TABLENAME,RECENTDAYS OBJECTFLAG,DATATYPE,STORETYPE,DBSOURCE,SORTINDEX,PARENTID,TABLENAMEALIAS,DATA_SOURCE, EXHIVETABLENAME,HIVETABLENAME,ELLEMENTNAME,DELETER,ISPRIVATE,SECRETLEVEL,SJZYBQ1,SJZYBQ2,SJZYBQ3,SJZYBQ4,SJZYBQ5,SJZYBQ6, RELATE_TABLENAME,SOURCEID,ISACTIVETABLE,HD_DBSOURCE,TABLENAME_B,ISQUERY,GA_SOURCEID,to_char(CREATETIME ,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as createTime,SJZZYJFLVALLUE as SJZZYJFLVALLUE,SJZZEJFLVALUE as SJZZEJFLVALUE,SJZYLYLXVALUE as SJZYLYLXVALUE,STANDARD_TYPE as standardType, to_char(UPDATETIME ,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as updateTimeStr, CREATOR as creator, UPDATER as updater,version,versions from synlte.OBJECT where deleted = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD'

select OBJECTID, RECNO, FIELDID, FIELDNAME, FIELDCHINEENAME, FIELDDESCRIBE, FIELDTYPE, FIELDLEN, DEFAULTVALUE, ISINDEX, NEEDVALUE, ISCONTORL, COLUMNNAME, MEMO, TABLEINDEX, ISQUERY, COLUMNNAME_STATE, MD5_INDEX, ISPRIVATE, STANDARD_RECNO, PK_RECNO, PARTITION_RECNO, CLUST_RECNO, case when ORA_SHOW is null then 0 else ORA_SHOW end as ORA_SHOW, NEEDV, FIELDTYPES, NEEDVALUES, ODPS_PATTITION, PRO_TYPE, FIELDSOURCETYPE, o.DETERMINERID, d.DCHINSENAME, ZDMGDFLDM, GADSJ_FIELDID, VERSION, INDEXTYPE, ZDFL, SJLYGCFL, RECONCILIATIONTYPE from synlte.OBJECTFIELD o left join (select distinct DCHINSENAME, DETERMINERID from synlte.fielddeterminer where determinerstate = '05') d on o.determinerid = d.determinerid
deleted = 0
and objectId = #{objectId}
order by RECNO

select OBJECTID, RECNO, FIELDID, FIELDNAME, FIELDCHINEENAME, FIELDDESCRIBE, FIELDTYPE, FIELDLEN, DEFAULTVALUE, ISINDEX, NEEDVALUE, ISCONTORL, COLUMNNAME, MEMO, TABLEINDEX, ISQUERY, COLUMNNAME_STATE, MD5_INDEX, ISPRIVATE, STANDARD_RECNO, PK_RECNO, PARTITION_RECNO, CLUST_RECNO, case when ORA_SHOW is null then 0 else ORA_SHOW end as ORA_SHOW, NEEDV, FIELDTYPES, NEEDVALUES, ODPS_PATTITION, PRO_TYPE, FIELDSOURCETYPE, o.DETERMINERID, ZDMGDFLDM, GADSJ_FIELDID, VERSION, INDEXTYPE, ZDFL, SJLYGCFL, RECONCILIATIONTYPE from synlte.OBJECTFIELD o where deleted = 0

select OBJECTID, RECNO, FIELDID, FIELDNAME, FIELDCHINEENAME, FIELDDESCRIBE, FIELDTYPE, FIELDLEN, DEFAULTVALUE, ISINDEX,NEEDVALUE, ISCONTORL, COLUMNNAME, MEMO, TABLEINDEX, ISQUERY, COLUMNNAME_STATE, MD5_INDEX, ISPRIVATE, STANDARD_RECNO, PK_RECNO, PARTITION_RECNO, CLUST_RECNO, ORA_SHOW, NEEDV, FIELDTYPES, NEEDVALUES, ODPS_PATTITION, PRO_TYPE, FIELDSOURCETYPE,DETERMINERID,ZDMGDFLDM,GADSJ_FIELDID, VERSION from synlte.OBJECTFIELD
objectId = #{objectId}
and (upper(COLUMNNAME) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%')))) or (upper(FIELDCHINEENAME) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%'))))
order by RECNO

select * from ( select * from synlte.OBJECTFIELD
deleted = 0
and objectId = #{objectId}
and upper(FIELDID) like upper('%'||#{searchInput}||'%')
and upper(COLUMNNAME) like upper('%'||#{searchInput}||'%')
and upper(FIELDNAME) like upper('%'||#{searchInput}||'%')
and upper(FIELDCHINEENAME) like upper('%'||#{searchInput}||'%')
and upper(FIELDID) like upper('%'||#{searchInput}||'%') or upper(COLUMNNAME) like upper('%'||#{searchInput}||'%') or upper(FIELDNAME) like upper('%'||#{searchInput}||'%') or upper(FIELDCHINEENAME) like upper('%'||#{searchInput}||'%')
)
deleted = 0
and objectId = #{objectId}
order by RECNO

select f.* from synlte.OBJECT o, synlte.OBJECTFIELD f
o.objectid = f.objectid and f.deleted = 0
and upper(o.tableid) = upper(#{tableId})
and f.fieldid like '%'||#{fieldId}||'%'
and f.fieldname like '%'||#{fieldNameEn}||'%'
and f.fieldchineename like '%'||#{fieldNameCh}||'%'
and f.needvalue = 1
and f.needvalue = 0
order by RECNO

select f.OBJECTID, f.RECNO, f.FIELDID, f.FIELDNAME, f.FIELDCHINEENAME, f.FIELDDESCRIBE, f.FIELDTYPE, f.FIELDLEN, f.DEFAULTVALUE, f.ISINDEX,f.NEEDVALUE, f.ISCONTORL, f.COLUMNNAME, f.MEMO, f.TABLEINDEX, f.ISQUERY, f.COLUMNNAME_STATE, f.MD5_INDEX, f.ISPRIVATE, f.STANDARD_RECNO, f.PK_RECNO, f.PARTITION_RECNO, f.CLUST_RECNO, f.ORA_SHOW, f.NEEDV, f.FIELDTYPES, f.NEEDVALUES, f.ODPS_PATTITION, f.PRO_TYPE, f.FIELDSOURCETYPE
from synlte.OBJECTFIELD f where f.fieldid = #{fieldId} and f.deleted = 0 and f.objectid =(select o.objectid from synlte.object o where upper(o.tableid) = upper(#{tableId}))

select.if: select codetext, codeid, field_class, valtext as field_class_ch, m.WORDNAME as sameWordType from (select s.field_class, e.codetext, e.codeid, b.valtext, s.sameid from (SELECT CODEID, field_class, sameid FROM synlte.SYNLTEFIELD WHERE fieldid = #{fieldId}) s LEFT JOIN synlte.FIELDCODE e on s.codeid = e.codeid left join (select CODETEXT as valtext, CODEID as valvalue from synlte.fieldcode where PARCODEID = 'GACODE000414' union select VALTEXT as valtext, VALVALUE as valvalue from synlte.fieldcodeval where codeid in (select codeid from synlte.fieldcode where PARCODEID = 'GACODE000414')) b on s.field_class = b.valvalue) a left join synlte.sameword m on a.sameid = m.sameid

mapper.select: select codetext as codeText, codeid as codeid, field_class as fieldClass, valtext as fieldClassCh, m.WORDNAME as wordName, fieldid as fieldid from (select s.field_class, e.codetext, e.codeid, b.valtext, s.sameid, s.fieldid from (SELECT CODEID, field_class, sameid, fieldid FROM synlte.SYNLTEFIELD ) s LEFT JOIN synlte.FIELDCODE e on s.codeid = e.codeid left join (select CODETEXT as valtext, CODEID as valvalue from synlte.fieldcode where PARCODEID = 'GACODE000414' union select VALTEXT as valtext, VALVALUE as valvalue from synlte.fieldcodeval where codeid in (select codeid from synlte.fieldcode where PARCODEID = 'GACODE000414')) b on s.field_class = b.valvalue) a left join synlte.sameword m on a.sameid = m.sameid

select label, value from (
select distinct PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH as value , PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH as label from CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE where PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH is not null and SJXJBM is not null
select distinct PRIMARYDATASOURCECH as value ,PRIMARYDATASOURCECH as label from CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE where PRIMARYDATASOURCECH is not null and SJXJBM is not null
select distinct FACTORONENAME as value , FACTORONENAME as label from CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE where FACTORONENAME is not null and SJXJBM is not null
) t1

select distinct FIELDID as id , FIELDID as value, fieldchinesename as name , FIELDID as fieldId FROM synlte.SYNLTEFIELD
FIELDID is not null and GADSJ_FIELDID is not null and upper(substr(FIELDID,0,3)) !='WBZ' and STATUS='05' and field_standard != '99'
and (upper(FIELDID) like upper('%'||#{condition}||'%') or upper(fieldchinesename) like upper('%'||#{condition}||'%'))

select distinct fieldname as id , fieldname as value, fieldchinesename as name, FIELDID as fieldId FROM synlte.SYNLTEFIELD
FIELDID is not null and GADSJ_FIELDID is not null and upper(substr(FIELDID,0,3)) !='WBZ' AND STATUS = '05' and field_standard != '99'
and (upper(fieldname) like upper('%'||#{condition}||'%') or upper(fieldchinesename) like upper('%'||#{condition}||'%'))

SELECT fieldid,fieldname,fieldchinesename,fielddescribe,fieldtype,fieldlen,defaultvalue, memo, columnname, deleted,codeid, sameid, is530new, fieldlen2, SECRET_CLASS as secretClass,GADSJ_FIELDID as gadsjFieldId from synlte.SYNLTEFIELD
upper(FIELDID) = upper(#{inputValue})
upper(FIELDID) = upper(#{inputValue})

select PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH||'/'||FIRSTORGANIZATIONCH||'/'||SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH as organizationClassify, SJYJFL||','||SJEJFLCODENAME||','||SJEJFL as classIds, PRIMARYDATASOURCECH||'/'||SECONDARYDATASOURCECH as sourceClassify, SJLYYJ||','||SJLYEJ as sourceClassIds, LABELS from CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE where upper(sjxjbm) = upper(#{tableId}) and SJXJBM is not null

select distinct PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH||'/'||FIRSTORGANIZATIONCH||'/'||SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH as organizationClassify, SJYJFL||','||SJEJFLCODENAME||','||SJEJFL as classIds, PRIMARYDATASOURCECH||'/'||SECONDARYDATASOURCECH as sourceClassify, SJLYYJ||','||SJLYEJ as sourceClassIds, LABELS, SJXJBM as tableId from CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE where SJXJBM is not null

select f1.codeid as codeId,f1.codetext as codeText ,f2.valtext as valText,f2.valvalue as valValue from synlte.fieldcode f1 inner join synlte.fieldcodeval f2 on f1.codeid=f2.codeid and f1.parcodeid='JZCODE0024'
select DISTINCT valtext from synlte.fieldcodeval where codeid like 'JZCODE0024%' and valvalue=#{sysCode} and rownum = 1

select.if:
select * from( select '' as primaryClassifyId, t1.PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as primaryClassifyCh, '' AS secondaryClassifyId, t1.SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH as secondaryClassifyCh, -- 二级分类中文名 t1.SJXJBM as tableId, -- 表id t1.TABLE_NAME_EN as tableNameEn, -- 表英文名 t1.NAME aS tableNameCh, -- 表中文名 t1.STATISTICS_TIME AS INSERT_DATE from( select * FROM ( SELECT j.*, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from table_organization_assets j ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 ) t1)
where (primaryClassifyCh like '%'||#{name}||'%' or secondaryClassifyCh like '%'||#{name}||'%'or upper(tableNameCh) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(tableNameEn) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(tableId) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%'))

select * from( select '' as primaryClassifyId, t1.PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH as primaryClassifyCh, '' AS secondaryClassifyId, t1.SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH as secondaryClassifyCh, -- 二级分类中文名 t1.SJXJBM as tableId, -- 表id t1.TABLE_NAME_EN as tableNameEn, -- 表英文名 t1.NAME aS tableNameCh, -- 表中文名 t1.STATISTICS_TIME AS INSERT_DATE from( select * FROM ( SELECT j.*, row_number ( ) over ( PARTITION BY lower(TABLE_PROJECT), upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) ORDER BY STATISTICS_TIME DESC ) as rnn from table_organization_assets j ) h WHERE h.rnn = 1 ) t1)
where (primaryClassifyCh like '%'||#{name}||'%' or secondaryClassifyCh like '%'||#{name}||'%'or upper(tableNameCh) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(tableNameEn) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(tableId) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%'))

select SJYJFL as primaryClassifyId, --- 一级分类代码 PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH as primaryClassifyCh, --- 一级分类中文 SJEJFL as secondaryClassifyId, -- 二级分类代码 case when SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH is null then '中间表' else SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH end as secondaryClassifyCh, -- 二级分类中文名 SJXJBM as tableId, -- 表id TABLENAME as tableNameEn, -- 表英文名 NAME as tableNameCh, -- 表中文名 INSERT_DATE from classify_interface_all_date where PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH is not null and SJXJBM is not null
and (PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH like '%'||#{name}||'%' or SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH like '%'||#{name}||'%'or upper(NAME) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(TABLENAME) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(SJXJBM) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%'))
GROUP BY SJYJFL,PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH,SJEJFL,SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH,SJXJBM,TABLENAME,NAME,INSERT_DATE order by INSERT_DATE desc

select SJLYYJ as primaryClassifyId, --- 一级分类代码 PRIMARYDATASOURCECH as primaryClassifyCh, --- 一级分类中文 SJLYEJ as secondaryClassifyId, -- 二级分类代码 case when SECONDARYDATASOURCECH is null then '中间表' else SECONDARYDATASOURCECH end as secondaryClassifyCh, -- 二级分类中文名 SJXJBM as tableId, -- 表id TABLENAME as tableNameEn, -- 表英文名 NAME as tableNameCh, -- 表中文名 INSERT_DATE from classify_interface_all_date where PRIMARYDATASOURCECH is not null and SJXJBM is not null
and (PRIMARYDATASOURCECH like '%'||#{name}||'%' or SECONDARYDATASOURCECH like '%'||#{name}||'%'or upper(NAME) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(TABLENAME) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%') or upper(SJXJBM) like upper('%'||#{name}||'%'))
GROUP BY SJLYYJ,PRIMARYDATASOURCECH,SJLYEJ,SECONDARYDATASOURCECH,SJXJBM,TABLENAME,NAME,INSERT_DATE order by INSERT_DATE desc

mapper.select: select ISACTIVETABLE from synlte.object where upper(tablename)=upper(#{tableName}) and relate_tablename='OBJECTFIELD'
select SJYJFL||','||SJEJFL as organizationClassify , SJLYYJ||','||SJLYEJ as sourceClassify from CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE where upper(sjxjbm) = upper(#{tableId}) and SJXJBM is not null
select distinct upper(columnname) from synlte.objectfield where objectid = #{objectId} and partition_recno is not null and (partition_recno != 0 or partition_recno != '0')

select FIELDID, FIELDNAME, FIELDCHINESENAME ,FIELDDESCRIBE,FIELDTYPE,FIELDLEN,DEFAULTVALUE, MEMO,COLUMNNAME,CODEID,SAMEID,IS530NEW,FIELDLEN2,ID,SECRET_CLASS as secretClass,r.valtext as secretClassCh from (select FIELDID, FIELDNAME, FIELDCHINESENAME ,FIELDDESCRIBE,FIELDTYPE,FIELDLEN,DEFAULTVALUE, MEMO,COLUMNNAME,CODEID,SAMEID,IS530NEW,FIELDLEN2,ID ,SECRET_CLASS from synlte.synltefield where upper(fieldid) = upper(#{fieldId}) ) l left join ( select valvalue, valtext from synlte.fieldcodeval where codeid='JZCODEGAZDMGD') r on l.SECRET_CLASS = r.valvalue
SELECT distinct TABLENAME FROM synlte.OBJECT where upper(tableId) = upper(#{tableId}) and rownum = 1
mapper.update: update synlte.object set OBJECTSTATE = '1'where upper(TABLEID) = upper(#{tableId})
mapper.select: select valtext as label,valvalue as value,memo as memo from synlte.fieldcodeval where codeid = 'GACODE000412'

select OBJECTID, RECNO, FIELDID, FIELDNAME, FIELDCHINEENAME, FIELDDESCRIBE, FIELDTYPE, FIELDLEN, DEFAULTVALUE, ISINDEX,NEEDVALUE, ISCONTORL, COLUMNNAME, MEMO, TABLEINDEX, ISQUERY, COLUMNNAME_STATE, MD5_INDEX, ISPRIVATE, STANDARD_RECNO, PK_RECNO, PARTITION_RECNO, CLUST_RECNO, ORA_SHOW, NEEDV, FIELDTYPES, NEEDVALUES, ODPS_PATTITION, PRO_TYPE, FIELDSOURCETYPE,DETERMINERID,ZDMGDFLDM from synlte.OBJECTFIELD where COLUMNNAME=#{columnName} AND OBJECTID =#{objectId}

select a.OBJECTID, a.RECNO, a.FIELDID, a.FIELDNAME, a.FIELDCHINEENAME, a.FIELDDESCRIBE, a.FIELDTYPE, a.FIELDLEN, a.DEFAULTVALUE, a.ISINDEX,a.NEEDVALUE, a.ISCONTORL, a.COLUMNNAME, a.MEMO, a.TABLEINDEX, a.ISQUERY, a.COLUMNNAME_STATE, a.MD5_INDEX, a.ISPRIVATE, a.STANDARD_RECNO, a.PK_RECNO, a.PARTITION_RECNO, a.CLUST_RECNO, a.ORA_SHOW, a.NEEDV, a.FIELDTYPES, a.NEEDVALUE as needValue, a.NEEDVALUES, a.ODPS_PATTITION, a.PRO_TYPE, a.FIELDSOURCETYPE,a.DETERMINERID,a.ZDMGDFLDM,a.GADSJ_FIELDID from synlte.OBJECTFIELD a left join synlte.object b on a.objectid = b.objectid where a.deleted=0 and b.tableid = #{tableId}

select OBJECTID, RECNO, FIELDID, FIELDNAME, FIELDCHINEENAME, FIELDDESCRIBE, FIELDTYPE, FIELDLEN, DEFAULTVALUE, ISINDEX,NEEDVALUE, ISCONTORL, COLUMNNAME, MEMO, TABLEINDEX, ISQUERY, COLUMNNAME_STATE, MD5_INDEX, ISPRIVATE, STANDARD_RECNO, PK_RECNO, PARTITION_RECNO, CLUST_RECNO, ORA_SHOW, NEEDV, FIELDTYPES, NEEDVALUES, ODPS_PATTITION, PRO_TYPE, FIELDSOURCETYPE,DETERMINERID,ZDMGDFLDM,GADSJ_FIELDID from synlte.OBJECTFIELD

select distinct objectname as label, tableId as value, to_char(objectid) as memo from synlte.object where objectstate=1
(upper(objectname) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchText},'%'))))

select DISTINCT f1.codeid as codeId,f1.codetext as codeText ,f2.valtext as valText,f2.valvalue as valValue from synlte.fieldcode f1 inner join synlte.fieldcodeval f2 on f1.codeid=f2.codeid and f1.parcodeid='JZCODE0024' where valvalue=#{value}

select distinct f1.codeid as codeId, f1.codetext as codeText, f2.valtext as valText, f2.valvalue as valValue from synlte.fieldcode f1 inner join synlte.fieldcodeval f2 on f1.codeid = f2.codeid and f1.parcodeid = 'JZCODE0024'

select OBJECTID as objectId,OBJECTNAME as objectName,objectMemo as objectMemo,OBJECTSTATE as objectState, TABLEID as tableId,TABLENAME as tableName,DATATYPE as dataType,ISACTIVETABLE as isActiveTable from synlte.object

select OBJECTID as objectId,OBJECTNAME as objectName,objectMemo as objectMemo,OBJECTSTATE as objectState, TABLEID as tableId,TABLENAME as tableName,DATATYPE as dataType,ISACTIVETABLE as isActiveTable from synlte.object where upper(TABLENAME) = upper(#{tableName}) and upper(relate_tablename)='OBJECTFIELD' and rownum = 1
